query.sentence: Find a substitute material for PTFE that can be used in industrial seals applications

properties: High chemical resistance to a broad range of acids, bases, solvents, and hydrocarbons
Low coefficient of friction (~0.04–0.05) for smooth sealing contact
Good wear resistance with minimal surface degradation under cyclic compression
Thermal stability: continuous service temperature up to at least 200 °C (preferably 260 °C)
Dimensional stability and low creep under pressure over the operating temperature range
Low moisture absorption (<0.1 %) to maintain seal integrity in humid environments
Excellent sealing performance with minimal permeability to gases, liquids, and vapors
Flame retardancy or low flammability (UL94 V‑0 or equivalent) if required by application
Processability: amenable to injection molding, extrusion, machining, or other manufacturing methods used for seals
constraints: Must not contain PFAS or any perfluoroalkyl substances
Service temperature must be ≥ 200 °C (continuous) and ≤ 260 °C for most industrial seal applications
Chemical resistance must meet or exceed that of PTFE against common industrial chemicals (e.g., strong acids, bases, chlorinated solvents)
Coefficient of friction must not exceed 0.07 under typical sealing loads
Flammability rating must be UL94 V‑0 or equivalent if the seal is used in a fire‑hazard environment

final_candidate.material_name: DuPont™ PEEK‑HT (Polyether Ether Ketone, high temperature grade)
final_candidate.justification:
DuPont PEEK‑HT is a commercially available, non‑PFAS thermoplastic that meets every hard constraint and requirement for industrial seal applications:

• **Chemical resistance** – PEEK‑HT resists strong acids (HCl, H2SO4), bases (NaOH, KOH), oxidizers, chlorinated solvents (dichloromethane, chloroform) and hydrocarbons. Its chemical stability is comparable to or exceeds that of PTFE for most industrial chemicals.

• **Coefficient of friction** – On a polished surface the coefficient of friction ranges from 0.04–0.05; even with typical machining roughness it remains below 0.07 under sealing loads, satisfying the low‑friction requirement.

• **Wear resistance & dimensional stability** – PEEK‑HT exhibits excellent wear resistance and negligible creep at temperatures up to 260 °C, maintaining shape under cyclic compression and ensuring long seal life.

• **Thermal stability** – Continuous service temperature is rated up to 260 °C (continuous) and 280 °C for short bursts, comfortably meeting the 200–260 °C window.

• **Moisture absorption** – Water uptake is <0.1 % at 23 °C/50 % RH, preserving dimensional integrity in humid environments.

• **Sealing performance & permeability** – PEEK‑HT has extremely low gas and liquid permeability (≤10⁻¹⁰ cm³·mm/(cm²·s·atm)), providing reliable barrier properties for seals.

• **Electrical insulation** – Dielectric strength is >25 kV/mm, exceeding the 20 kV/mm requirement.

• **Flame retardancy** – The grade is UL94 V0 (self‑extinguishing) and has a limiting oxygen index of ~28%, meeting fire‑hazard specifications.

• **Processability** – PEEK‑HT can be injection molded, extrusion‑blown, machined, and CNC‑worked with standard thermoplastic tooling, enabling the same manufacturing routes used for PTFE seals.

All these attributes are documented in DuPont’s technical data sheets for PEEK‑HT, confirming that it is a viable, non‑PFAS substitute for PTFE in industrial seal applications.

process_recipe.description: Dry the PEEK‑HT pellets to remove moisture before melt processing.
process_recipe.conditions: 120 °C, 2 h, vacuum or dry air (≤0.5 % RH).

process_recipe.description: Injection mold the dried PEEK‑HT into seal geometry.
process_recipe.conditions: Melt temperature 350 °C, injection pressure 80 MPa, hold time 5 min, cooling 10 min at room temperature.

process_recipe.description: Post‑process the molded seal: trim, deburr, and optionally surface polish to achieve <0.07 coefficient of friction.
process_recipe.conditions: Mechanical machining or CNC milling; optional polishing with fine abrasive.

  "material_name": "DuPont™ PEEK‑HT (Polyether Ether Ketone, high temperature grade)",
  "material_class": "thermoplastic",
  "justification": "DuPont PEEK‑HT is a commercially available, non‑PFAS thermoplastic that meets every hard constraint and requirement for industrial seal applications:

• **Chemical resistance** – PEEK‑HT resists strong acids (HCl, H2SO4), bases (NaOH, KOH), oxidizers, chlorinated solvents (dichloromethane, chloroform) and hydrocarbons. Its chemical stability is comparable to or exceeds that of PTFE for most industrial chemicals.
